name: Rasa Pro
pricing_notes: Rasa OSS free; Rasa Pro license required for production; Enterprise custom pricing

auth.notes: JWT for Rasa server API; Rasa Pro requires license key; OSS needs no auth

performance.notes: Intent classification ~100ms; self-hosted performance depends on hardware; NLU pipeline tunable

agent_readiness.notes: Open-source conversational AI framework with CALM (Conversational AI with Language Models) in Rasa Pro. Self-hosted for data privacy. Custom NLU pipeline (DIET, TED). REST API + Python SDK. Supports slot filling, forms, custom actions. Rasa Pro adds LLM-powered intent classification and enterprise features. Best for teams needing self-hosted, customizable dialog management.

gotchas: Rasa OSS is free but lacks CALM (LLM integration) which requires Pro license
Significant ML expertise required to tune NLU pipeline effectively
CALM (LLM features) still maturing in Rasa Pro v3
Smaller community since pivot to Pro licensing model
best_when: Self-hosted conversational AI with full data control (healthcare, finance)
Teams with ML expertise wanting fully customizable NLU/dialog pipeline
Enterprise contact center requiring on-premises deployment
avoid_when: Small teams without ML/NLU expertise (use Voiceflow/Botpress instead)
Cloud-only deployments where self-hosting adds no value
Need for rapid prototyping (significant upfront configuration)
summary: Rasa is the leading open-source conversational AI framework, with Rasa Pro adding CALM (LLM-powered intent classification) and enterprise features. Self-hosted for full data control. Highly customizable NLU pipeline (DIET, TED models). REST API + Python SDK. Best for organizations requiring on-premises deployment of conversational AI with ML expertise available. OSS is free; production-grade LLM features require Pro license.
